reviews.comment:
Es una de las Estaciones de Servicio YPF típicas de la ciudad, con ACA, estacionamiento para socios, drugstore y café! Con varios surtidores y bien ubicada!

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the typical YPF service stations in the city, with an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), member parking, a drugstore, and a café! It has several pumps and is well located!
